name: Taco Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl and blend well.
2. Spoon the mixture onto a 6-inch square of aluminum foil and fold to make an airtight package.
3. Label as Taco Seasoning Mix. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 6 months.
4. Makes 1 package (about 2 tablespoons) of mix. Using the above recipe as a guide you can increase the amounts to make any number of packages.
Taco Fillin:
1. Brown 1 lb lean ground beef in a medium skillet over medium-high heat; drain the excess grease.
2. Add 1/2 cup water and the seasoning mix. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Makes filling for 8 to 10 tacos.
